anchor: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM title as t, kind_type as kt, movie_info as mi1, info_type as it1, movie_info as mi2, info_type as it2, cast_info as ci, role_type as rt, name as n WHERE t.id = ci.movie_id AND t.id = mi1.movie_id AND t.id = mi2.movie_id AND mi1.movie_id = mi2.movie_id AND mi1.info_type_id = it1.id AND mi2.info_type_id = it2.id AND it1.id = '3' AND it2.id = '5' AND t.kind_id = kt.id AND ci.person_id = n.id AND ci.role_id = rt.id AND mi1.info IN ('Action','Adult','Adventure','Comedy','Crime','Family','Fantasy','Horror','Thriller') AND mi2.info IN ('Argentina:Atp','Argentina:X','Brazil:Livre','Canada:13+','Canada:14A','Norway:18','Portugal:M/16','Singapore:M18','South Korea:18','Switzerland:14','USA:PG','USA:PG-13','USA:Passed','USA:Unrated') AND kt.kind IN ('tv movie','tv series','video game') AND rt.role IN ('costume designer','director') AND n.gender IN ('f') AND t.production_year <= 2015 AND 1925 < t.production_year;
